# DestinyPal

> DestinyPal is an AI-powered fortune and self-discovery service offering tarot readings, Korean Saju (Four Pillars), Western astrology, compatibility analysis, and a personalized destiny counselor — available in Korean and English.

DestinyPal blends traditional divination (tarot, saju, astrology) with large language models to deliver conversational, personalized readings. Free-form questions are answered with concrete, card- and chart-grounded interpretations rather than generic horoscopes. Readings can be saved, revisited, and shared as images.

## Core services
- [Tarot reading](https://destinypal.com/tarot): AI tarot for free-form questions (love, career, money, decisions) with per-card and overall interpretation, follow-up questions, and clarifier cards.
- [Destiny counselor](https://destinypal.com/destiny-counselor): An AI counselor chat grounded in Korean Saju (Four Pillars of Destiny) and astrology.
- [Compatibility](https://destinypal.com/compatibility): Relationship compatibility between two people via saju and astrology.
- [Calendar](https://destinypal.com/calendar): A personal timing guide highlighting meaningful dates.
